prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-8ULDRRBCCS-MED-RD Product Type: TOOLS Brand (from catalog): Universal Tool Existing Title: 8" Compact Utility Bolt Cutter Hand Tool for 3/16 Gauge Steel with Easy Grip Description: The Compact Light Duty Bolt Cutters are the ideal accessory for your travel or emergency tool box.

The 8 inch cutters feature a 1 inch cutting depth and are designed to be used on electrical wire, piano wire, and just about all types of industrial wire about 4mm or smaller in diameter.

These bolt cutters were made to make your job easier; just don't expect to cut off any master locks or hardened steel chain links.

FEATURES/SPECIFICATIONS:

Length: 8 inches
Weight: 0.5LBS
Cutting Depth: 1 inch
Injection Molded Plastic Handle

PACKAGE INCLUDES:

(1) 8-1/2" Bolt Cutters Search Terms: exclusive bolt cutters emergency preparedness home improvement Features: - QUICK ACCESS: Mini Bolt Cutters have forged and hardened alloy steel jaws with a compound cutting action which requires less effort than hand action bolt cutter utility shears - QUALITY CRAFTSMANSHIP: Full length steel handles feature a cushioned nonslip grip that fit firmly in either hand providing precision control - COMPACT PORTABLE UTILITY: Overall Weight: .5lbs | 1" Cutting Depth | Length 8-inches - 8-inch BOLT CUTTERS: Ideal for cutting soft metal, chain, bolts, threaded rods and heavy gauge wire up to 3/16 in. diameter === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Universal Tool 8" Compact Utility Bolt Cutter

anthropic.title_differentiation: Forged Steel Jaws, 1 Inch Cutting Depth, Nonslip Grip, Portable Lightweight

openai.title_differentiation: Forged Hardened Alloy Steel Jaws, Compound Cutting Action, Cushioned Nonslip Grip, 1" Cutting Depth, Cuts Wire Up To 316"
